rationale: The citing paper is a conceptual editorial that defines Mitigation in Marketing around reducing unintended harms and includes a narrative historical review of mitigation-oriented JMR research. The cited 2020 JMR article is directly aligned, examining when consumption regulations backfire and identifying a reactance mechanism plus mitigation-relevant source/framing effects, so it could be used as substantive evidence for the mitigation lens. With a direct DOI match and this strong conceptual/mechanistic fit, this pair should be kept for full relation judgment.
